column2: # Общая подготовка: точное повторение логики авторов
# Имитируем очистку пропусков из Stata-кода авторов
filter(district == "Bloom", treat_group %in% c("Control", "Financial low", "Financial high", "Financial loss")) %>%
mutate(treat_group = factor(treat_group, levels = c("Control", "Financial low", "Financial high", "Financial loss")))
`Baseline test score` + Female + Black + Hispanic + `Free or reduced price lunch` ~ treat_group * (Mean + SD),
title = "Table 3: Baseline Characteristics by Treatment Group: Bloom"
